title: Rich Smoky Dutch Beef Kidney Wrap
description: A smoky and savory Dutch dish featuring beef kidney, lacquer glaze, and wrapped in a lotus leaf, perfect for a light and satisfying meal.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together the lacquer glaze, smoked paprika, olive oil, garlic, salt, and black pepper.
Add the sliced beef kidney to the bowl and toss to coat with the glaze mixture.
Lay a large lotus leaf flat on a work surface and arrange a quarter of the beef kidney mixture in the center of the leaf.
Fold the stem end of the leaf over the filling, then fold in the sides and roll the leaf into a tight cylinder.
Repeat with the remaining lotus leaves and beef kidney mixture.
Place the wraps on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and bake for 20 minutes.
Remove the wraps from the oven and let them cool for a few minutes before serving.
